name: Image Processing
summary: Backend processing of uploaded images for multimodal AI agent input
goals: Process and validate uploaded images for AI model compatibility
Convert images to appropriate formats for model consumption

specDetail.description: Backend logic in agent-service that processes uploaded images: validates format, resizes if necessary, converts to base64 or stores temporarily, and includes them in the AI model request payload.

parameters.name: imageData
parameters.description: Base64-encoded image data or temporary file path

constraints: Must strip EXIF metadata for privacy before sending to model
Must resize images exceeding the maximum dimension while preserving aspect ratio
Must reject unsupported image formats with a clear error message

acceptanceCriteria.given: a valid image is uploaded with a message
acceptanceCriteria.when: the message is processed by the backend
acceptanceCriteria.then: the image is resized if needed, converted, and included in the AI model request

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: docs(sync-specs): implement leaf determination redesign with frontend/backend criteria
